quote: When reading, only read. When eating, only eat. When thinking, only think. – Seungsahn
fact: There are only four words in the English language which end in "dous": tremendous, horrendous, stupendous, and  hazardous.
joke: What do you get when you cross a bee and a sheep? A bah-humbug.
